name: strajkpolski-mcp
displayName: Strajk Polski — Polish open data (debt, budget, MPs, votings)
description: Verified open data about Poland for AI agents: national debt, state budget, 460 Sejm MPs, votings & voting alignment, politician quotes, government map + payroll cost, semantic RAG search. Free, MIT, sourced to gov.pl/sejm.gov.pl.
